features: Compatibility : The toothbrush heads is compatible with Oral B i0 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 series electric toothbrushes,replacement heads for l0 Gentle Care,Ultimate clean,Ultimate white
Different-Length Bristles: The brush head features bristles of varying lengths to reach deep into tooth gaps and enhance cleaning power.
Round Brush Head Design: The round brush head better wraps around teeth and reaches deep into gaps, effectively enhancing cleaning performance.
Take Care of Your Health: These tooth brush heads bristles with end-rounded design would offer better care for teeth and gums
Warm Customer Service: If you are not satisfied or the product breaks, we will handle your problem in time.
